page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2gne.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 32 physical cores and 32 vCPUs with a single thread per core configuration. The system is equipped with 128 GB of RAM, yielding 4.0 GB of memory per core, and includes 3839 GB of local SSD storage. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps under a KVM hypervisor.

Benchmark results indicate a contrast between single-core and multi-core performance. Single-core metrics, including stress-ng and Geekbench single-core scores, fall into the bottom 25% tier, while single-threaded gzip compression is in the bottom 10%. However, multi-core performance scales to average levels, as demonstrated by stress-ng multi-core, Passmark CPU, and Geekbench multi-core benchmarks. Memory bandwidth for both small cached blocks and large uncached blocks remains in the average tier.

Given the substantial 3839 GB local SSD storage and balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance is structured for storage-intensive and database workloads. It achieves average performance in database operations, Redis SET operations, and static web serving. The dedicated CPU allocation and large local storage capacity offer a balanced resource density, making it a qualitatively cost-efficient option for workloads requiring high local storage capacity without needing top-tier single-core compute speeds.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2gne.8xlarge is an x86_64 server instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs running at 2.5 GHz, 128 GB of RAM, and 3839 GB of local SSD storage. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. Performance benchmarks show weak single-core capabilities, with single-threaded stress-ng and Geekbench scores in the bottom 25%. However, multi-core performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations consistently reach average tiers. Lacking GPU acceleration, this instance relies on its dedicated physical cores and substantial local storage capacity. It is designed for storage-heavy and database workloads, such as Redis deployments, static web serving, and medium-scale data processing, where local storage density and multi-core scaling are prioritized over raw single-threaded CPU speed.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2gne.8xlarge is a storage-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 3839 GB of local SSD storage, delivering average multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2gne.8xlarge features 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 3839 GB local SSD storage for database and storage workloads.
tagline: A dedicated multi-core server featuring substantial local SSD storage and balanced memory configuration for database and storage-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs with 128 GB RAM
3839 GB of bundled local SSD storage
Average multi-core CPU and database benchmark performance
Suited for local database hosting, Redis, and static web serving
